summary: Test code is well-written in structure and logic, but the suite is incomplete. bumper.test.ts comprehensively tests the core module (parseCommit, determineBumpType, bumpVersion, generateChangelog, bump integration), achieving ~4/5 coverage. However, workflow.test.ts references 5 non-existent fixture files (commits-patch.txt, commits-minor.txt, commits-major.txt, commits-mixed.txt) and the workflow file itself (.github/workflows/semantic-version-bumper.yml), so all act integration tests would fail immediately. The fixture files are critical because workflow.test.ts calls copyFileSync on paths that don't exist. Task requirement "ALL TESTS MUST RUN THROUGH ACT" and "Create mock commit logs as test fixtures" are not met—the fixtures are referenced but not provided. bumper.test.ts alone has good edge-case rigor (breaking markers, scopes, empty files, error handling), but workflow.test.ts cannot execute, making the overall suite unreliable for regression detection.
